file.content:
--- a/rts/StgCRun.c
+++ b/rts/StgCRun.c
@@ -673,6 +673,11 @@ StgRunIsImplementedInAssembler(void)
 #endif

 #if defined(powerpc64_HOST_ARCH)
+#if !defined(_CALL_ELF) || _CALL_ELF != 2
+/*
+ * PowerPC64 ABI v1 (big-endian) - uses .opd sections for function descriptors
+ * For ppc64le (ABI v2, _CALL_ELF==2), skip this section and use StgCRunAsm.S
+ */
 /* 64-bit PowerPC ELF ABI 1.9
  *
  * Stack frame organization (see Figure 3-17, ELF ABI 1.9, p 14)
@@ -736,7 +741,8 @@ StgRunIsImplementedInAssembler(void)
         : : "i"((RESERVED_C_STACK_BYTES+288+15) & ~15 /*stack frame size*/));
 }

-#endif
+#endif /* !defined(_CALL_ELF) || _CALL_ELF != 2 */
+#endif /* powerpc64_HOST_ARCH */

 #if defined(powerpc64le_HOST_ARCH)
 /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
